propositions: The post-deletion smoke test only proves linkage but is named/positioned as if it proves every leaf is invocable, so it should be renamed and rescoped to stale-import/linkage detection.
test_repair_json_receives_schema only asserts the schema is forwarded as a kwarg and never verifies schema guidance changes a parsed result.
A new behavioral test should pin schema-guided parsing showing parse_structured coerces payload '{"count":"3"}' to count==3 int while schema-less tolerant_parse returns {"count":"3"} string.
test_capture_baseline_not_implemented_error_not_raised only asserts is not None and duplicates stronger neighboring baseline tests, so it should be deleted or folded.
Acceptance requires make lint, make typecheck, and make test to pass on the landed tree.
